reference: I am twenty-seven years old and it has been one and a half years since my marriage. I have been trying hard to conceive. My doctor has prescribed me Siphene fifty for five days from the 3rd day of my cycle, and also Productive F for a month. I am not sure what Productive F is used for. Also, I have tried taking Fertyl for more than six months or so.
